mapper.insert: INSERT INTO owner_applications (user_id, roastery_id, store_name, store_description, store_address, latitude, longitude, opening_hours, category, phone_number, thumbnail_url, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{application.userId}, #{application.roasteryId}, #{application.storeName}, #{application.storeDescription}, #{application.storeAddress}, #{application.latitude}, #{application.longitude}, #{application.openingHours}, #{application.category}, #{application.phoneNumber}, #{application.thumbnailUrl}, #{application.status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE owner_applications SET status = 'APPROVED', reviewed_by = #{adminId}, reviewed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{applicationId} AND status = 'PENDING'

UPDATE owner_applications SET status = 'REJECTED', reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, reviewed_by = #{adminId}, reviewed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{applicationId} AND status = 'PENDING'
